    keywfA2RDn8lUK5G564pebQdA
    descriptionXhargreg: ”I’ve run into a little problem… I don’t know if you have noticed… but those damn Nezerians are immune to poisons and highly resistant to kinetic attacks… this unfortunately results in an unfair advantage over my poor wasps… *sob*... you need to do something about this! The Renegades in Zergilin have developed a toxin that reduces kinetic resistances…hrmm... this could prove to be the key… go to my old lab in Zergilin” Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “bzzzz???”
    mustBeInorderNo
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionXhargreg: ”Kill 32 Renegade Spies and collect samples from their Corrosive Missiles” Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “bzzzz!!!” Crew: “Eeeek! Where did that come from???”
    addedBodies["8UX4ujQOAkChwhxVLE1ubw"]

    availableYes
